TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Palamitan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,016 buwan, 2,787 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 826 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 1,961 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 17%, Bunun 1%, Truku 8%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Palamitan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Palamitan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Palamitan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Palamitan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Palamitan hya' ga Paudadan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ palamitan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, truku *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na palamitan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na palamitan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na palamitan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na palamitan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na palamitan ħjaʔ ɣa pau*a*an. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Palamitan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Sincima go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,016 buwan, 2,787 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 826 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 1,961 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 17%, Bunun 1%, Truku 8%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Palamitan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Palamitan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Palamitan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Palamitan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Palamitan hya' ga Paudadan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ palamitan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕinʦ~ʨima ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, truku *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na palamitan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na palamitan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na palamitan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na palamitan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na palamitan ħjaʔ ɣa pau*a*an. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
